summary: Iteration 6: Comprehensive P0 feature testing of المؤذن العالمي (The Global Muezzin). Backend: 15/15 tests passed covering auth (login, register, auth/me), admin endpoints (stats with protection), prayer times API, hijri date, daily hadith. Frontend: All P0 features verified - Auth page with login/signup tabs working, PermissionManager overlay displays correctly with pre-request UI, ThemeToggle cycling (auto/light/dark) works, Admin Dashboard accessible to admin users with 6 tabs, non-admin users see 'غير مصرح' message.

minor.issue: 403 error in console - non-blocking, translation API external issue

critical_code_review_comments: Auth login with admin credentials (mhmd321324t@gmail.com / admin123) returns access_token ✅
Auth register creates new users successfully ✅
Auth/me returns user info with valid token ✅
Admin stats protected - returns 403 for non-admin, 401 without token ✅
Prayer times API returns all 6 prayer times (fajr, sunrise, dhuhr, asr, maghrib, isha) ✅
PermissionManager shows pre-request UI with location benefits explanation ✅
ThemeToggle cycles through auto → light → dark modes ✅
Admin Dashboard shows all 6 tabs (overview, users, ads, notifications, pages, settings) ✅
Non-admin users see 'هذا الحساب ليس مسؤولاً' message ✅
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed users created during pytest for auth testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features tested and working. Auth flow complete with email/password login. MosqueService integrates with UnifiedPrayer context. PermissionManager appears on first load (dismissible). ThemeToggle on More page. Admin dashboard protected with email whitelist. Translation API has external 403 (non-blocking).

backend_apis.auth_login_admin: ✅ POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns access_token
backend_apis.auth_register: ✅ POST /api/auth/register creates new user with token
backend_apis.auth_me_valid: ✅ GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
backend_apis.admin_stats_admin: ✅ GET /api/admin/stats with admin token returns stats

frontend_pages.permission_manager: ✅ Overlay appears with location permission UI
frontend_pages.theme_toggle: ✅ ThemeToggle on More page cycles themes
